---
name: New Tool Proposal
about: Propose a new tool to add to Toolbase
title: '[TOOL] '
labels: new-tool, proposal
assignees: ''
---

## Tool Name
<!-- What would you call this tool? -->

## What does it do?
<!-- 2-3 sentence description -->

## Why does it belong in Toolbase?
<!-- How does it fit our privacy-first, browser-only philosophy? -->

## Privacy Check
- [ ] All processing happens entirely in the browser
- [ ] No user data is sent to any external server or API
- [ ] No third-party service receives any file content

## Technical Approach
<!-- How would you implement this? Pure JS? WASM? Python via Pyodide? -->

## Similar tools in other platforms
<!-- e.g. "Similar to Smallpdf's compress feature but runs locally" -->

## Are you willing to build it?
- [ ] Yes, I want to build this
- [ ] I'm proposing it for someone else to build

## Mockup / Screenshot (optional)
<!-- Rough UI idea? Drop an image or describe it -->
